## What this changes

<!-- One or two lines: what and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No personal data — no real names, emails, hosts, paths, secrets, or client/employer names
      (fixtures go under `examples/` and are obviously fictional).
- [ ] Ran `./aether doctor` — all green.
- [ ] Ran `tools/precommit-scan .` — clean.
- [ ] Doctrine (`system/SYSTEM.md`) and `README.md` updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] If a skill is adapted from upstream: added the `origin:` frontmatter + a `NOTICE.md` entry
      (MIT-compatible only).
